## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1)

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 99.1%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 99.3%. This is the third highest among RP4 states. With regard to the 0.9% of flights that did not adhere, 0.8% were early and 0.1% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
